prompt: A cinematic, hyper-detailed rustic interior scene of a solitary older farmer sitting at a wooden table, intensely focused on a modern laptop as if entering deep work mode. He wears a weathered straw hat, a light sage-gray work shirt with rolled sleeves, and blue denim overalls. The composition is centered and symmetrical, medium shot from the front, with both forearms resting on the table behind the laptop. A dramatic golden energy aura explodes outward from behind and around his body, forming radiant sparks, glowing streaks, electric filaments, and a halo-like outline that makes him look powerfully energized and unstoppable. The room is a warm, moody farmhouse workspace with 1 large multi-pane window on the left casting soft natural light, 1 metal cup holding several pens and pencils, 1 ceramic mug, 1 open notebook with 1 pen in the foreground, 1 closed book at the lower left edge, and 3 stacked books on the right side of the table. In the dim background, include 2 faint ghostlike or memory-like human figures, one on the left and one on the right, subtle and partially obscured by the glowing energy. Use rich amber and sepia tones, dust motes, dramatic backlighting, high contrast, shallow depth of field, textured wood grain, and a heroic, surreal atmosphere blending rural life with modern productivity. Photorealistic, ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, square composition.
